detailed_results.question: Quais são os 10 municípios com maior taxa de mortalidade em internações obstétricas, entre aqueles com mais de 200 internações obstétricas e taxa acima da média nacional obstétrica?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: WITH media_obs AS (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN i."MORTE" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS taxa_media_obstetrica FROM internacoes i WHERE i."ESPEC" = 2) SELECT mu.nome, mu.estado, COUNT(*) AS total_obstetrico, SUM(CASE WHEN i."MORTE" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_mortes, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN i."MORTE" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 4) AS taxa_mort_obstetrica, ROUND(mo.taxa_media_obstetrica, 4) AS media_nacional FROM internacoes i JOIN municipios mu ON i."MUNIC_RES" = mu.codigo_6d, media_obs mo WHERE i."ESPEC" = 2 GROUP BY mu.nome, mu.estado, mo.taxa_media_obstetrica HAVING COUNT(*) > 200 AND SUM(CASE WHEN i."MORTE" = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) > mo.taxa_media_obstetrica ORDER BY taxa_mort_obstetrica DESC LIMIT 10;
detailed_results.predicted_sql: WITH total_internacoes AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM internacoes WHERE "ESPEC" = 2 ), obitos AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_obitos FROM internacoes WHERE "ESPEC" = 2 AND "MORTE" = true ) SELECT ROUND((ob.total_obitos * 100.0 / ti.total), 2) AS taxa_mortalidade FROM total_internacoes ti, obitos ob;

detailed_results.question: Quais os 3 hospitais com maior valor médio de serviço hospitalar (VAL_SH) por estado (MA e RS), considerando hospitais com mais de 500 internações?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: SELECT estado, "CNES", total_internacoes, avg_val_sh, rk FROM (SELECT mu.estado, i."CNES", COUNT(*) AS total_internacoes, ROUND(AVG(i."VAL_SH"), 2) AS avg_val_sh, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY mu.estado ORDER BY AVG(i."VAL_SH") DESC) AS rk FROM internacoes i JOIN municipios mu ON i."MUNIC_RES" = mu.codigo_6d WHERE mu.estado IN ('MA', 'RS') AND i."VAL_SH" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY mu.estado, i."CNES" HAVING COUNT(*) > 500) sub WHERE rk <= 3 ORDER BY estado, rk;

detailed_results.question: Em qual mês de cada ano (2008-2023) ocorreu o maior número de internações em UTI?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: SELECT ano, mes, total_uti FROM (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "DT_INTER") AS ano, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "DT_INTER") AS mes, COUNT(*) AS total_uti, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "DT_INTER") ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn FROM internacoes WHERE "VAL_UTI" > 0 AND "DT_INTER" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ano, mes) sub WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY ano;

detailed_results.question: Qual a média de dias de internação por especialidade médica, comparando lado a lado os estados MA e RS?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: SELECT e."DESCRICAO" AS especialidade, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN mu.estado = 'MA' THEN i."DIAS_PERM" END), 2) AS media_dias_MA, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN mu.estado = 'RS' THEN i."DIAS_PERM" END), 2) AS media_dias_RS, COUNT(CASE WHEN mu.estado = 'MA' THEN 1 END) AS total_MA, COUNT(CASE WHEN mu.estado = 'RS' THEN 1 END) AS total_RS FROM internacoes i JOIN especialidade e ON i."ESPEC" = e."ESPEC" JOIN municipios mu ON i."MUNIC_RES" = mu.codigo_6d WHERE mu.estado IN ('MA', 'RS') GROUP BY e."DESCRICAO" HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN mu.estado = 'MA' THEN 1 END) > 100 AND COUNT(CASE WHEN mu.estado = 'RS' THEN 1 END) > 100 ORDER BY especialidade;

detailed_results.question: Quais são os 10 municípios do Maranhão com Bolsa Família acima da média estadual e mortalidade infantil abaixo da média estadual?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: WITH media_ma AS (SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN s.metrica = 'bolsa_familia_total' THEN s.valor END) AS avg_bf, AVG(CASE WHEN s.metrica = 'mortalidade_infantil_1ano' THEN s.valor END) AS avg_mi FROM socioeconomico s JOIN municipios mu ON s.codigo_6d = mu.codigo_6d WHERE mu.estado = 'MA'), por_municipio AS (SELECT mu.nome, MAX(CASE WHEN s.metrica = 'bolsa_familia_total' THEN s.valor END) AS bolsa_familia, MAX(CASE WHEN s.metrica = 'mortalidade_infantil_1ano' THEN s.valor END) AS mort_infantil FROM socioeconomico s JOIN municipios mu ON s.codigo_6d = mu.codigo_6d WHERE mu.estado = 'MA' GROUP BY mu.nome) SELECT pm.nome, pm.bolsa_familia, pm.mort_infantil FROM por_municipio pm, media_ma mm WHERE pm.bolsa_familia > mm.avg_bf AND pm.mort_infantil < mm.avg_mi AND pm.bolsa_familia IS NOT NULL AND pm.mort_infantil IS NOT NULL ORDER BY pm.bolsa_familia DESC LIMIT 10;
